name: node-estraverse

description:
ECMAScript JS AST traversal functions
Estraverse is ECMAScript traversal functions from esmangle project

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-estraverse because ECMAScript JS AST traversal functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-estraverse as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-estraverse with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-estraverse --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
